chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2483 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 03.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Naqqash Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Bilal Malik, Assistant Director (Law) Election Commission of Pakistan. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. This petition has been filed seeking directions to the learned Election Tribunal to decide the petition within a certain time. Upon being queried as to whether timeline prescribed is mandatory or directory, learned counsel states that it is clearly latter. Under such circumstances, no case is made out to entertain this petition or to interfere in the affairs of another judicial tribunal. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
